seo.title: About EFH House — Prefab & Modular Building for Global B2B
seo.description: EFH House delivers prefab housing and modular building solutions—space capsule houses, container houses, double-wing expandables, and flat pack containers—with product storytelling, project intake, and modular program alignment for international buyers.

sections.title: Your partner for prefab and modular building worldwide
sections.description: EFH House serves overseas buyers, contractors, camp developers, and hospitality investors. Through space capsule houses, container houses, double-wing expandable containers, and flat pack containers, we support resort camps, construction lodging, interim housing, mobile offices, and commercial modular programs. We communicate honestly and professionally—avoiding inflated capacity claims, decorative certification marks, or unverified overseas representation on this website.
sections.imageAlt: EFH House prefab modular building solutions

sections.title: Advancing every housing project beside you
sections.description: From the first inquiry we seek your country or region, primary use, preferred product family, approximate scale, timing expectations, and finish or performance goals. Project managers translate that brief into clear modular direction, documentation milestones, and demarcation among manufacturing, freight, and field partners—so visibility into progress and outcomes stays high.

items.label: Coverage across sectors
items.description: Capsule, container, expandable, and flat pack combinations stretch from premium hospitality to large construction villages.

items.label: Cross-border project habits
items.description: We are accustomed to varying voltage practice, foundation culture, and customs vocabulary—surfacing assumptions early to limit late-stage drift.

items.label: Project-team follow-up
items.description: Forms, email, and messaging channels route to human specialists who support enterprise programs and engineered scopes—never anonymous consumer flows.

steps.title: Transparent information
steps.description: Registration and operating facts track official records; we describe capability squarely—without inventing distant branch networks or overstating on-the-ground coverage.

steps.title: Integrity in compliance claims
steps.description: Certificates or test references appear only when they genuinely apply to the products discussed—never as ornamental graphics.

steps.title: Practical delivery posture
steps.description: We refrain from publishing unverified throughput figures or campus scale claims; schedules and milestones answer client questions on provable terms.

steps.title: Engineering accountability
steps.description: Structural and MEP questions land with named engineering counterparts so technical dialogue stays serious and traceable.

sections.title: Start a conversation
sections.description: Share project briefs, visualization sets, or owner requirement summaries. EFH House responds through agreed commercial channels. This website omits embedded live chat so correspondence stays clear and auditable.
